    # Compliance verification: check for prohibited content, proper procedure

    banned_patterns = ["<script>", "rm -rf", "exec(", "eval(", "../../../etc"]

    elif size == 17 and content == "Hello, I'm ready!":
        print(f"success: legal_compliance_verified|no_violation|procedure_valid")
